title: BIRTH, LABOR, DELIVERY CLASSES - 211info
text: ADVENTIST HEALTH PORTLAND BIRTH, LABOR, DELIVERY CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Classes provide information about all options about birth, labor, delivery, breastfeeding, and caring for a newborn. 10123 SE Market Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Pregnant parents Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 256-4000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Portland classes (503) 256-4000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or sign up online FEES: $30-$99 per class. Does not bill insurance. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Buses connect with MAX Light Rail (Blue and Red Lines) at the Gateway Transit Center. The MAX Green Line's SE Main Street Station serves the hospital at Main & 96th Ave. Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Childbirth Education Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HOSPITAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ADVENTIST HEALTH PORTLAND
